label: neither
rationale: Criticizes Ruto's violence and discusses how blame is anticipated to be placed on Kikuyus, but does not attack Kikuyus as a group.

label: hate
rationale: 'wajaluo wabaki wakingoja pawa' - mocks Luos collectively as politically naive, easily duped while others get benefits.

label: offensive
rationale: 'battalion of mumus' - crude insult aimed at political opponents (goons), not an ethnic group.

label: neither
rationale: Electoral demographics and political commentary about a politician: 'Susan Kihika wantam'.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Emotional retards' directed at specific individuals in online debate, not an ethnic group as such.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Nyinyi ni watu fala sana...Watu useless sana' - crude insults about political choice, not ethnic targeting.

label: offensive
rationale: 'We ni goon murkomen' - calls individual politician a goon.

label: hate
rationale: 'Islamic party...responsible for...thousands of Hindus killing and rape' - holds religious community collectively responsible for violence.

label: neither
rationale: 'FIFA is as corrupt as Kasongo' - personal comparison, political criticism.

label: offensive
rationale: 'You have murdered enough people, Murkomen' - threatening accusation directed at individual politician.

label: hate
rationale: 'Luos and their curse' - attributes a collective negative characteristic (curse) to Luos as a community.

label: neither
rationale: 'Luos doing another rent-free month in your head' - political banter about obsession, then electoral arithmetic.

label: hate
rationale: 'luyas are never beating the allegations' - attributes collective negative characteristic (easily bought) to Luhyas.

label: hate
rationale: 'infected with the Wamunyoro deadly virus' - dehumanizes ethnic association as disease.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Mko na ujinga Sana, lakini ni wantam' - generic insult without clear ethnic target.

label: hate
rationale: 'luhya + stomach is what they prefer...they don't need roads, good schools, good hospitals' - collective contempt: easily bought with food, don't value development.

label: neither
rationale: 'Wacha wamlambe...they will cook him' - political metaphor about politicians, no ethnic targeting.

label: neither
rationale: 'Kipsigis leaders in Wamunyoro...entire country is wantam' - political commentary about leaders.

label: hate
rationale: 'Jaluos...You don't get development simply by yapping Tutam' - attributes collective negative characteristic (all talk) to Luos.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Hao watu wa Kalonzo wakufe' - death wish directed at political supporters, not ethnic group.

label: neither
rationale: 'kikuyus...they want power for themselves' - ethnic-bloc electoral analysis about voting patterns and power calculations.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Ruaraka land thief' - personal insult directed at individual politician.

rationale: 'I hate Ruto. Fuck Ruto. If you support him fuck you too' - crude personal attack on politician and supporters.

rationale: 'islamic vermin terrorists' - dehumanizes Muslims as vermin in context of mass violence allegations.
